nodes.summary: audit-versions verifies each tracked var matches versions.lock exact VAR=value
audit-versions verifies each tracked var's value present under canonical YAML key in manifest
audit-versions increments failures and emits apps_version_contract_check_total metric
audit-versions-cached includes catalog files in fingerprint when they exist
apps-smoke verifies lock and manifest are mutually consistent when catalog enabled
contract checker runs without PyYAML using regex line-matching
all contract check failures report file path, expected snippet, and actual value
checker reads only local files via pathlib; no network, subprocess, or shell injection
apps_version_contract_check_total metric emitted with status label per invocation
when catalog files absent, contract checks skipped without error; audit proceeds normally
human-readable per-check stdout report; non-zero exit when any check fails
check_versions_lock returns failing result for stale var in lock file
check_manifest_yaml returns failing result for missing yaml_key:value line in manifest
check_catalog_consistency returns failing result when lock var value mismatches manifest
stale FASTAPI_VERSION in versions.lock causes audit_versions to exit non-zero
no catalog files present: contract checks skipped, apps_version_contract_check_total not emitted
fingerprint includes catalog files when present, excludes when absent
apps-smoke (catalog enabled) exits non-zero when lock and manifest are inconsistent
